keyValues.current.markup.group.can.not.be.deleted: Currently used markup group can not be deleted. Firstly select other group.
keyValues.markup.group.id.must.be.positive: Markup group id must be greater than 0.
keyValues.markup.group.name.max.length: Markup group name must not exceed 128 characters.
keyValues.markup.group.currency.id.must.be.positiv: Markup group currency id must be greater than 0.
keyValues.markup.group.ranges.required: Markup group must contain at least one range.
keyValues.markup.range.start.must.not.be.negative: Markup range start must not be negative.
keyValues.markup.range.end.must.not.be.negative: Markup range end must not be negative.
keyValues.markup.range.end.must.be.greater.than.st: Markup range end must be greater than range start.
keyValues.markup.range.markup.must.not.be.negative: Markup value must not be negative.
